description: Configure the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web console (http://localhost:8081) to use HTTPS. Use the credentials admin/Admin@2024. The configuration must use HTTPS port 8444, a default self-signed certificate, and automatically redirect HTTP requests to HTTPS. Save the settings (a service restart is not required). Export a screenshot of the final configuration to C:\workspace\https_config_result.png and record the port number in a text file at C:\workspace\https_config_summary.txt.
